name: Frozen Strawberry Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg whites until fluffy.
2. Add the berries, lemon juice, and sugar. Beat for at least 15 minutes.
3. Whip the cream until thick. Fold it into the berry mixture.
4. Pour into the prepared pie shell and freeze until ready to serve.
5. (Graham cracker shell works well.)
6. Other berries or fruit may be substituted for the strawberries.
Alternative:
1. Use one 12 oz. container of Cool Whip or other non-dairy topping instead of cream.
